docs.title: Welcome to the Knowledge Atlas
docs.text:
Select a textbook below to begin your journey.

- **Biology** --- Explore the science of life, from cells to ecosystems. [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Start Reading](biology/index.md) - **Physics** --- Master the laws of the universe, motion, and energy. [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Start Reading](physics/index.md) - **The Team** --- Learn more about the educators behind these resources. [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Meet Us](team.md)
